%mor:	noun|dank pron|je-Prs-Nom-S2 adv|wel +".

%mor:	pron|ik-Prs-Nom-S1 verb|smullen-Fin-Pres-S adv|er adp|van +".

%mor:	pron|ik-Prs-Nom-S1 verb|willen-Fin-Pres-S adv|nog det|een-Ind noun|ijs-Neut-Acc +".

%mor:	det|de-Def noun|indiaan pron|die-Rel-S1 verb|pakken-Fin-Pres-S det|een-Ind noun|bal-Acc .

%mor:	pron|ik-Prs-Nom-S1 verb|bedoelen-Fin-Pres-S det|een-Ind noun|appel-Acc .

%mor:	pron|hij-Prs-Nom-S3 verb|pakken-Fin-Pres-S pron|hem-Prs-Acc-S3 adp|op det|de-Def noun|steen .

%mor:	pron|hij-Prs-Nom-S3 verb|kunnen-Fin-Pres-S adv|er adv|niet adp|bij .

%mor:	pron|hij-Prs-Nom-S3 verb|vallen-Fin-Pres-S .

%mor:	det|de-Def noun|ridder pron|die-Rel-S1 verb|pakken-Fin-Pres-S pron|hem-Prs-Acc-S3 .

%mor:	det|de-Def noun|ridder pron|die-Rel-S1 verb|pakken-Fin-Pres-S det|de-Def noun|appel-Acc .

%mor:	intj|alsjeblieft +".

%mor:	pron|ik-Prs-Nom-S1 verb|eten-Fin-Pres-S pron|hem-Prs-Acc-S3 adp|op +".

%mor:	det|de-Def noun|indiaan pron|die-Rel-S1 verb|zien-Fin-Pres-S det|de-Def noun|appelboom-Acc .

%mor:	pron|hij-Prs-Nom-S3 verb|proberen-Fin-Pres-S det|een-Ind noun|appel-Acc adp|te verb|pakken-Inf-S .

%mor:	cconj|maar pron|het-Prs-S3 verb|lukken-Fin-Pres-S pron|hem-Prs-Acc-S3 adv|niet .

%mor:	adj|heel-S1 adj|goed-S1 .

%mor:	cconj|en adv|dan verb|vallen-Fin-Pres-S det|de-Def noun|indiaan adp|van det|de-Def noun|steen adp|af .

%mor:	cconj|en adv|dan verb|komen-Fin-Pres-S det|de-Def noun|mexicaan adv|eraan adp|met det|de-Def noun|ladder .
